/CAL:TO JOIN #22003214/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT VIA ZOOM//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: #2//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR 1 YEAR; DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH PRC AND NOT TO SUFFER NO NEW CHARGESOR CONVICTIONS/WEAP/X:D,A, TO MONITOR DEJ AND PAROLE PETITION/OR/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SUBMIT TO DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS/X:NOTCONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/X:REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISESOF RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES: 9 AM - 10 AM (MONDAYS TO FRIDAYS) TO TAKEKIDS TO SCHOOL; MONDAYS, TUESDAYS, THURSDAYS AND FRIDAYS 3:15 PM - 4:15 PM TO PICK KIDS UP; WEDNESDAYS 2:15 PM - 3:15 PM TO PICK KIDS UP; FRIDAYS FROM 5 PM - 9 PM FOR AA MEETINGS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:IF DEFENDANTIS SUCCESSFUL, CHARGE CAN BE REDUCED TO MISDEMEANOR/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS:ISS, 2 YEARS FORMAL PROBATION, CTS AT SENTENCE, OBEY, IND, FINES & FEES/VD:05-20-22 IN DEPT 12 FOR PTC/
